# webhook

```go
import "github.com/grethel-labs/kubelink-usb/internal/webhook"
```

Package webhook implements admission webhooks for defaulting and validating USB device and policy custom resources.

<a name="DeviceDefaulter"></a>
## type [DeviceDefaulter](<https://github.com/grethel-labs/kubelink-usb/blob/main/internal/webhook/device_defaulter.go#L20>)

DeviceDefaulter sets defaults for USBDevice fields. It runs as a mutating admission webhook to ensure every USBDevice has sensible initial values for DeviceClass, Description, and NodeName.

@component DeviceDefaulterWH\["DeviceDefaulter"\] \-\-\> USBDevice\["USBDevice CR"\]

```go
type DeviceDefaulter struct{}
```

<a name="DeviceDefaulter.Default"></a>

```go
func (d *DeviceDefaulter) Default(_ context.Context, obj runtime.Object) error
```

Default sets default values for empty USBDevice fields.

<a name="PolicyValidator"></a>
## type [PolicyValidator](<https://github.com/grethel-labs/kubelink-usb/blob/main/internal/webhook/policy_validator.go#L24>)

PolicyValidator validates USBDevicePolicy selector IDs. It runs as a validating admission webhook, rejecting policies whose vendor or product IDs are not valid 4\-digit hex values.

@component PolicyValidatorWH\["PolicyValidator"\] \-\-\> PolicyCR\["USBDevicePolicy CR"\]

```go
type PolicyValidator struct{}
```
